name: Integration - Summarize Meeting End-to-End
description: Tests the full workflow from input validation, preprocessing, LLM call, formatting, to response for /summarize.
input: POST /summarize with a realistic transcript and valid user_email.
output: SummarizeMeetingResponse with all fields correctly populated.
success_criteria: Final response contains expected summary structure
error_scenarios: LLMService returns FALLBACK_RESPONSE on repeated failure
Any service raises exception, error is handled gracefully
